title: Licenses Cheat Sheet
description: Quick reference for common software licenses and their usage

commands.command: Permission is hereby granted, free of charge, to any person obtaining a copy...
commands.description: Basic structure of an MIT License
commands.scenario: Basic structure of an MIT License

commands.command: COPYING or LICENSE file with full MIT text
commands.description: Include MIT License in a project
commands.scenario: Include MIT License in a project

commands.command: You can modify, distribute, and sublicense the software.
commands.description: MIT License allows modification and distribution
commands.scenario: MIT License allows modification and distribution

commands.command: This program is free software: you can redistribute it and/or modify...
commands.description: Basic structure of a GPL License
commands.scenario: Basic structure of a GPL License

commands.command: COPYING or LICENSE file with full GPL text
commands.description: Include GPL License in a project
commands.scenario: Include GPL License in a project

commands.command: Any derivative work must also be distributed under the GPL.
commands.description: GPL License requires derivative works to be open-source
commands.scenario: GPL License requires derivative works to be open-source

commands.command: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
commands.description: Basic structure of an Apache License
commands.scenario: Basic structure of an Apache License

commands.command: LICENSE file with full Apache License 2.0 text
commands.description: Include Apache License in a project
commands.scenario: Include Apache License in a project

commands.command: The license includes a provision for patent rights.
This work is licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License.
commands.description: Basic structure of a Creative Commons License
commands.scenario: Basic structure of a Creative Commons License

commands.command: LICENSE file or text in README with specific CC license details
commands.description: Include Creative Commons License in a project
commands.scenario: Include Creative Commons License in a project

commands.command: Some CC licenses include non-commercial clauses.
commands.description: Creative Commons licenses can restrict commercial use
commands.scenario: Creative Commons licenses can restrict commercial use

commands.command: Redistribution and use in source and binary forms, with or without modification, are permitted provided that the following conditions are met:
commands.description: Basic structure of a BSD License
commands.scenario: Basic structure of a BSD License

commands.command: LICENSE file with full BSD license text
commands.description: Include BSD License in a project
commands.scenario: Include BSD License in a project

commands.command: BSD licenses permit proprietary use of the software.
